global.description: The ad features a combination of text and graphic elements with a light blue background.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the app with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center with a light blue background.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape overlapping the central graphic, also in light blue.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: An elongated oval shape positioned centrally, blending with the background.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape at the bottom, slightly darker than the background.

elements.label: Bottom left graphic
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Top right icon
elements.description: A small arrow icon located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Central small shape
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'StarVault UGC' in a large font.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Text in the center stating 'Exclusive tonight Start free today' in a medium font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in a bold font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA is at the bottom.
